Joypad Config

Disconnected

Connect your Joypad device to configure it.

USB requires Chrome, Edge, or Opera with Web Serial support.
BLE requires Chrome with Web Bluetooth support.
Note: Unpair the device from your OS Bluetooth settings before connecting via BLE.

Device

App -
Version -
Board -
Serial -
Commit -
Build -

USB Output Mode

Current Mode

Changing mode will reboot the device.

BLE Output Mode

Current Mode

Changing mode will reboot the device.

Source -

Left Y

I2C Expander

SDA Pin

NeoPixel LEDs

LED Pin
LED Count

Speaker

Speaker Pin
Enable Pin

Saving will reboot the device to apply the new pin configuration.

Profiles

Manage Profiles

Edit Profile

For each input button, select what output button it should produce.

Left Stick 100%
Right Stick 100%

How to handle simultaneous opposite cardinal directions (e.g. Left+Right).

Wiimote

Orientation

Controls D-pad mapping when using Wiimote alone (no extension).

Input Test

Input (Raw)

B1 B2 B3 B4 L1 R1 L2 R2 S1 S2 L3 R3 L4 R4 DU DD DL DR A1 A2 A3
LX: 128
LY: 128
RX: 128
RY: 128
L2: 0
R2: 0

Output (Mapped)

B1 B2 B3 B4 L1 R1 L2 R2 S1 S2 L3 R3 L4 R4 DU DD DL DR A1 A2 A3
LX: 128
LY: 128
RX: 128
RY: 128
L2: 0
R2: 0
